summary: Iteration 20 testing complete. Fixed critical bug in bulk endpoints (now accept JSON body via Pydantic models). All 14 backend tests pass. Frontend features verified: Deal linking (Lead/Contact/Company selectors), amber recommendation on lead selection, Contacts page Add/Import/Bulk operations.

bugs_fixed.issue: Bulk endpoints (POST /api/bulk/delete, /bulk/update, /bulk/enrich, /bulk/add-to-campaign) returned 422 because they expected query params not JSON body
bugs_fixed.fix: Added Pydantic models (BulkDeleteRequest, BulkUpdateRequest, BulkEnrichRequest, BulkAddToCampaignRequest) and updated endpoint signatures

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/bulk/delete - bulk delete contacts (2 deleted)
Backend: POST /api/bulk/delete - bulk delete leads (2 deleted)
Backend: POST /api/bulk/delete - invalid entity type returns 400
Backend: POST /api/bulk/update - bulk update lead status
Backend: POST /api/bulk/add-to-campaign - add lead emails to campaign
Backend: POST /api/contacts/import-csv - import contacts from CSV (2 imported)
Backend: POST /api/deals with lead_id - deal linked to lead
Backend: POST /api/deals with contact_id - deal linked to contact
Backend: POST /api/deals with company_id - deal linked to company
Backend: POST /api/contacts - manual contact creation with 6 fields
Backend: POST /api/bulk/enrich - endpoint exists and responds
Backend: GET /api/leads - returns leads for deal selector
Backend: GET /api/contacts - returns contacts for deal selector
Backend: GET /api/companies - returns companies for deal selector
Frontend: Landing page logo (earnrm wordmark) visible at 96px height
Frontend: Deals page - New Deal dialog has Lead/Contact/Company selectors
Frontend: Deals page - Selecting lead shows amber recommendation
Frontend: Contacts page - Add Contact button opens dialog with 6 fields
Frontend: Contacts page - Import CSV button opens import dialog
Frontend: Contacts page - Checkbox selection on contact rows
Frontend: Contacts page - Bulk action bar with Delete appears on selection
seed_data_creation: Test data cleaned up during testing. Some test contacts (BulkTestContact) cleaned up via bulk delete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 20 features verified working. Bulk endpoints now properly accept JSON body via Pydantic models. Deals can be linked to Lead/Contact/Company with UI selectors. Contacts page has manual Add, CSV Import, and bulk delete features. Landing page logo is 96px height at xl breakpoint, same as H1 text height.

deal_entity_linking.amber_recommendation: Shows when lead is selected: 'Linking to a lead suggests a lower probability of closing. Consider 10-30%.'

contacts_csv_import.supported_columns: first_name, last_name, email, phone, company, job_title, linkedin_url, website, location

bulk_endpoints.body_format: JSON with entity_type, entity_ids, and optionally updates/campaign_id

landing_page_logo.note: Logo and H1 are same height, both prominent
